name: Nike Volleyball Camp at Benedictine University - Little Volleys Half Day Camp (June 8–11, 2026)
description: Spend part of summer 2026 training at our volleyball camp hosted at Benedictine University in Illinois! Athletes will enjoy practicing in a modern, air-conditioned gym designed to keep players comfortable while staying active on the court. Under the guidance of Head Coach Jennifer Wildes, campers will focus on skill development, teamwork, and confidence building. Open to boys and girls ages 7–18, this camp offers plenty of game play, chances to make new friends, and a safe, supportive environment where athletes can learn and grow together.
